speaker: speaker1
text: Where did you want to go for lunch ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I was thinking we should just go to the cafeteria .

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't think I ever got food from the cafeteria .

speaker: speaker2
text: I actually like the food there .

speaker: speaker1
text: Does the cafeteria sell a lot of different food ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I was thinking about getting some Chinese food .

speaker: speaker2
text: I bought some chow mein at the cafeteria . It tasted great .

speaker: speaker1
text: We can eat at the cafeteria .

speaker: speaker2
text: I think you'll really like the food there .
